nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Uzziah, first to last, the prophet Isaiah, the son of Amoz, has written.

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Uzziah, from first to last, Isaiah the prophet the son of Amoz wrote.

cnv.text: 烏西雅其餘的事蹟，一生的始末，亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞先知都記下來了。

ccb.text: 乌西雅其他的事迹，自始至终都是亚摩斯的儿子以赛亚先知记载的。
